title: uentremo
html:
uentremo

Remove the specified occurrence from an entity parameter. 

long uentgeto (UHACT hEnt, long occNr );

Parameters

hEnt
Handle to the entity parameter (which must be of type OUT or INOUT)
occNr
Sequence number of the occurrence to be removed

Return Values

See the "Call-In API Return Codes" topic..

Use

Library: ucall

Description

uentremo removes the specified occurrence from an entity parameter. Note that it cannot be used with an occurrence parameter. This function is very similar to the ProcScript function remocc. In particular it follows the same rules for the sequence number occNr. Refer to the remocc ProcScript statement for additional information.

As with remocc, the current occurrence remains current, except when you remove the current occurrence, in that case next occurrence becomes current (the occurrence number stays the same).

Example: uentcreo, uentremo, uentseto

The following example uses uentcreo to create 20 occurrences of an entity parameter, and then calls uentremo to remove every other occurrence, so that only the even-numbered occurrences remain. It then activates the operation SETENT in service ENTSRV, that prints the even-numbered occurrences to the message frame. The entity ENT is defined with the following:

PK CHAR(3)
REC CHAR(20)

Operation SETENT is defined as follows:

operation setent
params
entity ent : in;
endparams
$1 = 1
setocc "ent", $1
while ( $status >= 0 )
putmess "pk = %%pk rec = %%rec"
$1 = $1 + 1
setocc "ent", $1
endwhile
return 0
end

The following is the 3GL code:

#include <h3gl.h>
void set_ent ()
{
UHACT hEnv, hIn; /* Environment and instance handle */
UHACT hOp, hEnt; /* Operation and entity handles */
long actStatus, procErr; /* Activation status and procerr */
int i; /* Occurrence loop counter */
char s1[80]; /* Work string */
ueopen(&hEnv;) /* Get environment handle */
uinstnew (hEnv, (UCHAR *)"ENTSRV", 0, 0,
UDEFAULT_COMM_MODE, 0, &hIn, &procErr);/*Instantiate service ENTSRV */
uinstopr (hIn, (UCHAR *)"SETENT", 0, &hOp);/*Instantiate operation SETENT */
uprmgeth(hOp, 1, 0, &hEnt); /* Get entity handle for ENT parameter */
for ( i=1 ; i<=20; i++ ) /* Do 20 occurrences */
{
uentcreo(hEnt, -1); /* Add occurrence at the end */
sprintf(s1, "%d", i); /* Generate PK data */
ustr2uf(hEnt, 1, s1); /* Fill PK */
sprintf(s1, "Record %d", i);/* Generate REC data */
ustr2uf(hEnt, 2, s1); /* Fill REC */
}
for ( i=1; /* Delete every other occurrence */
uentremo(hEnt, i)==UACT_SUCCESS; i++ );
uopract (hOp, &actStatus, &procErr); /* Activate ENTSRV */
uinstdel (hIn, 0); /* Delete ENTSRV instance */
ufreeh (&hOp;) /* Free SETENT operation handle */
ufreeh (&hIn;) /* Free ENTSRV instance handle */
ufreeh (&hEnv;) /* Free environment handle */
}

    Codes that can possibly be returned by functions from the 3GL call-in API are consistent with the values returned by the ProcScript function $procerror, unless noted otherwise.

  • uentcreo

    Create an occurrence of an entity parameter, and make it current.

  • uentseto

    Make an occurrence of an entity parameter current.

  • remocc

    Mark an occurrence of the specified entity for deletion at the next store.
